response.justification: This is a fundamental domain and qualification mismatch. The role requires native-level Japanese language proficiency, which is entirely absent from the resume, and specialized expertise in embedded firmware security, Linux kernel development, and LAN-switch networking. Bogdan's entire recent career (6+ years) has been in web/cloud development at Google and Meta. His only C/C++ experience was at National Instruments over 10 years ago, and there is no evidence of embedded systems work, security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X), or network protocol knowledge (NETCONF, SNMP) required for this role.
strengths: Senior-level engineer with 15+ years of software development experience and proven ability to handle complex, high-performance systems
Demonstrates expertise in low-latency, scalable infrastructure with demonstrated success optimizing systems handling millions of requests per second
Fluent English communication and proven ability to work in international teams across multiple timezones and cultures
concerns: No evidence of native-level or any Japanese language proficiency, which is listed as a required qualification for this role
Recent 6+ years entirely in web/cloud development (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS); zero recent experience with embedded systems, firmware, or hardware-level development
No demonstrated expertise in required security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, device encryption), networking layers (NETCONF, SNMP), or Linux kernel investigation and modification

key_factors.factor: Domain expertise mismatch: web/cloud engineer vs. embedded firmware security engineer
C programming skills outdated (10+ years ago); primary recent languages are web-stack focused
